---
title: "Doctrine effects: MUF vs. Military Necessity"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Doctrine effects: MUF vs. Military Necessity}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>",
  fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4
)
```

```{r}
library(dynasimR)
sim <- load_example_data()
```

## The core comparison

The two MEDTACS scenarios `M-S07` (Military Necessity) and `M-S08`
(Medical Urgency First) differ only in the triage doctrine applied.

```{r}
doc <- doctrine_effect(
  sim,
  muf_scenario    = "M-S08",
  milnec_scenario = "M-S07",
  n_bootstrap     = 500
)
print(doc)
```

## Delta KIA visualisation

```{r}
plot_doctrine(doc)
```

## Auto-generated narrative

The `narrative` slot is a LaTeX-escaped string ready to drop into a
manuscript:

```{r, results = "asis"}
cat(doc$narrative)
```

## Effect sizes

```{r}
doc$effect_sizes
```
